summary: E-commerce project for 'knotankey' brand. Adding 'Payment via Email' messaging to checkout and order confirmation pages, styled in soft luxury aesthetic.
architectural_notes: Brand: knotankey — soft luxury aesthetic; primary accent color #F8F5F0 (very light beige)

existing_features.title: On the CheckoutPage, add a 'Secure Payment Process' notice box positioned between the Order Total display and the Place Order button. The box must have a background color of #F8F5F0 (very light beige), rounded corners, a small lock icon on the left, and comfortable vertical margin above and below. The title text should read 'Secure Payment Process' and the body should read: 'After placing your order, we will send a secure payment link to your email. Payment will be completed securely through that link to confirm your order.' All typography and styling must match the existing knotankey soft luxury aesthetic.

On the ThankYouPage (order confirmation page), add a payment instructions message block displayed below the existing order confirmation message. The message should read: 'Your order has been received. We will review your order and send a secure payment link to your email shortly to complete the purchase. Please complete the payment through that link to confirm your order.' Style this message to match the soft luxury knotankey aesthetic, consistent with the notice box added on the checkout page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add 'Payment via Email' notice box on checkout page (between Order Total and Place Order button) with lock icon, beige #F8F5F0 background, rounded corners, and branded messaging
Add payment via email instructions on order confirmation/thank you page below the confirmation message
